subcodes.title: Words to Doctor Finkelstein, spoken on 1915-05-03
subcodes.first_line: Buy a piece of land on the top of the mountain and build for yourself a lovely summer house. Then marry a strong, vigorous, athletic girl like thyself.
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @laws of marriage and dowry
